summary: Iteration 134: Tested all Vehicle Weight API endpoints (20/20 passed) and frontend Vehicle Weight tab. All features working correctly - no 'Data fetch error' found.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test vehicle weight entry during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Vehicle Weight APIs tested and working: GET /api/vehicle-weight (list with filters), GET /api/vehicle-weight/pending, GET /api/vehicle-weight/next-rst, GET/PUT /api/vehicle-weight/auto-notify-setting, POST /api/vehicle-weight (create), PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/second-weight, PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit, GET /api/vehicle-weight/by-rst/{rst_no}, DELETE /api/vehicle-weight/{id}, GET /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/slip-pdf. Frontend: Login -> Entries tab -> Auto Vehicle Weight sub-tab loads correctly with New Entry form, Live Weighbridge display, Pending Vehicle List, and Completed Entries table with all action icons (Edit, Print, Download, WA, Group, Delete).

features_tested.backend_list_weights: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight returns entries with count
features_tested.backend_list_with_filters: PASS - kms_year, status, limit filters work correctly
features_tested.backend_next_rst: PASS - GET /api/vehicle-weight/next-rst returns next RST number
features_tested.backend_create_entry: PASS - POST /api/vehicle-weight creates entry with first weight
features_tested.backend_verify_pending: PASS - Created entry appears in pending list
features_tested.backend_verify_completed: PASS - Entry moves from pending to completed
features_tested.backend_verify_deletion: PASS - Deleted entry no longer in list
features_tested.frontend_vehicle_weight_subtab: PASS - Auto Vehicle Weight sub-tab loads
features_tested.frontend_new_entry_form: PASS - Form with Date, Vehicle, Party, Farmer, Product, Trans Type, Pkts, Remark, Cash, Diesel, First Weight
features_tested.frontend_live_scale: PASS - Weighbridge display showing simulated weight
features_tested.frontend_pending_list: PASS - Pending Vehicle List card visible
features_tested.frontend_completed_table: PASS - Completed Entries table with all columns and action icons
